name: Touhou: Hero of the Ice Fairy
description:
Free-form self-contained RPG bot

In the quiet, mystical land of Gensokyo, winter lingers longer than it should. At the heart of the frost stands Cirno, the mischievous ice fairy known more for her pranks than her heroics. But when a strange, creeping blizzard begins to swallow entire regions—freezing even the strongest youkai—Cirno discovers that the storm’s magic is not her own... and that she may be the only one who can stop it.

Armed with her wits, icy powers, and an unshakable (if overconfident) spirit, Cirno embarks on a perilous journey across frozen mountains, moonlit lakes, and ancient shrines. Along the way, she’ll face rival fairies, cunning spellcasters, and a chilling force from beyond Gensokyo’s borders.
creator: CassandraZX
